hero.title: What if saving the planet was in your hands?
hero.subtitle: Sauve qui Pousse is the game where your garden becomes the battlefield for biodiversity. Six cards, one mission: have the cleanest garden.
hero.tagline: Sauve qui Pousse, the game that does good for the garden.

concept.title: Around the table, everyone tends their garden.
concept.p1: A pollinating bee, a watchful ladybug, an earthworm turning the soil: every little creature boosts your score. But nature is fragile, and the wheel at the center of the table has the final say.
concept.p2: Each turn, it spins and seals your fate. You plant a hedge, dig a pond, attract pollinators... or the lawnmower rolls through, frost strikes, the neighbor's cat causes chaos.
concept.p3: You protect your insects. You sabotage others'. You pass your pesticides to your neighbor with a big smile.

how.title: Three decks. One wheel. One victory cry.
how.desc: Draw, bonus or malus: each turn, the wheel decides. Build your garden, protect it, and when you think you have the best ecosystem at the table, shout 'Sauve qui pousse!'

pedagogy.title: A game that entertains and teaches.
pedagogy.intro: Every card hides a fact. Not a lecture — a simple, striking truth.
facts: Bees pollinate 80% of flowering plants. Without them, no fruit, no vegetables.
Lawnmowers destroy insects and their habitats. Letting grass grow protects biodiversity.
Fallow land is leaving a field to rest. It lets insects naturally resettle.
pedagogy.conclusion: Insects are essential: bees, ladybugs, earthworms sustain our ecosystems. Defending the environment has no age. It's a fight that spans generations.

audience.title: Ages 7 to 77.
audience.desc: With family, friends, or in class: Sauve qui Pousse fits every garden and every gardener.

cards.name: Bees
cards.desc: Essential pollinators, they visit up to 2,000 flowers per day!

cards.name: Earthworms
cards.desc: Soil engineers, they aerate the ground and make it fertile.

cards.name: Ladybugs
cards.desc: Natural predators, they devour up to 100 aphids per day.

cards.name: Hornets
cards.desc: Fearsome predators, they regulate insect populations.

cards.name: Pesticides
cards.desc: A silent threat, they contaminate soils and groundwater.

cards.name: Agriculture
cards.desc: Intensive farming weakens ecosystems and biodiversity.

cards.name: Scarecrow
cards.desc: Garden guardian, it protects crops from hungry birds.

hero.title: Sauve qui pousse!
hero.subtitle: The game that does good for the garden.
hero.intro: Each player manages a garden of 6 cards. The more insects in your garden, the better off you are. Clear your hand of pesticide cards, sabotage your opponents, and be the first to finish!

principle.title: Principle
principle.desc: Each turn, draw a new card and swap it with one in your hand to build a clean garden.

wheel.title: The digital wheel
wheel.desc: The wheel is only used to draw. It offers infinite spaces:

bonus.label: Bonus spaces
bonus.desc: Positive actions: protection, getting rid of bad cards...

trap.label: Trap spaces
trap.desc: Negative actions: your hand gets sabotaged.

malus.label: Malus cards
malus.desc: Harmful actions, bad weather, invasive insects...

win.title: How to win
steps: A player shouts "Sauve qui pousse!" when their hand total is positive.
The current round ends: all players finish their turn.
All hands are revealed and each player's points are added up.
The player with the highest score wins the round.
win.tiebreak: The player with the most insect cards wins.

hero.title: Every card has a story.
hero.subtitle: Behind every illustration, there's an insect, a gesture or a garden hazard — and always a small fact that says a lot about biodiversity.

cards.wip: Bonus and malus cards coming soon!

detail.flip_hint: Click the illustration to flip the card

hero.title: Your garden awaits.
hero.subtitle: Create an account or log in to join an online game.

register.title: Sign up!
register.subtitle: Create your account in seconds to start playing.
register.legal: By creating an account, you agree to our terms of use.

logged.subtitle: Your garden is ready. Create or join a game!

features.title: Once logged in:
items: Create a game and invite friends with a simple code
Spin the wheel directly from the screen, just like the physical tablet
Follow your garden and other players in real time

demo.title: Just want to try?
demo.desc: Discover a demo game without creating an account. Perfect for getting a feel before diving in for real.

active.extra_spin_desc: You get to spin the wheel one more time.
active.skip_desc: No card this time. Pass it on.
